---
title: "Qian Luo: Energy, Environment, and Human Health"
description: "Research on energy, environment and human health"
image: /files/headshots/qian-luo.jpeg
author: "Climate Guest Speakers"
date: "2025-03-17"
categories: [Climate and Industry]
#page-layout: full
#bibliography: references.bib
#csl: chicago-syllabus.csl
#suppress-bibliography: true
#link-citations: false
#citations-hover: false
listing:  #an example of listing external links
#  template: item-default-external.ejs
- id: speaker
  sort: "date asc"
  type: grid
  fields: [image, title, subtitle]
  grid-item-align: center
  grid-columns: 2
  image-height: 300px
#  categories: true
#  sort-ui: true
#  filter-ui: true
  contents:
    - path: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=l1Yz7rEAAAAJ&hl=en #linkedin profile or personal website
      image: /files/headshots/qian-luo.jpeg
      title: "Dr. Qian Luo"
#      author: 
      subtitle: "Postdoctoral Researcher, Princeton University"
#      date: "2024-03-12"
#      categories: [] 
page-navigation: false
title-block-banner: false
#toc: false
---

## Title

Energy, Environment, and Human Health


### Time

Monday, March 17, 2025    
6:00PM - 7:00PM ET

### Venue 
Online via zoom. Please [register](https://forms.gle/65hnhJPmnYaz5utG9) to participate.

## About

Dr. Luo will share her research on the energy, environment and human health.


## Speaker

:::{#speaker}
:::


### Bio

Dr. Luo is a postdoctoral researcher at Princeton University.


<!--Include social share buttons-->

{{< include /files/includes/_socialshare.qmd >}}
